title: Charlotte City Council to Decide on Mayor Lyles' Replacement
summary: Charlotte City Council will decide who fills Mayor Vi Lyles' seat. The selection process is expected to be outlined in early June.
charlotte_impact: The selection of a new mayor will significantly impact Charlotte's policies and future direction.

title: Sunshine for Mother's Day Followed by Rain on Monday
summary: Mother's Day will be sunny, but a cold front is expected to bring showers and thunderstorms on Monday. Sunshine returns by Tuesday.
charlotte_impact: Weather updates are important for planning outdoor activities and staying informed about potential disruptions.

title: Two Fatalities in Overnight Shooting in Charlotte
summary: An overnight shooting in Charlotte on Rozzelles Ferry Road resulted in the deaths of two people. Police are investigating.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing issue of gun violence and its impact on community safety.

title: East Charlotte Residents Oppose Proposed Data Center
summary: East Charlotte neighbors are pushing back against a proposed data center, demanding stronger regulations and more public input.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates community concerns about the environmental and social impact of new developments.

title: Councilmember Graham Discusses Key Charlotte Issues
summary: Councilmember Graham discusses Mayor Lyles, I-77 toll lanes, data center land use, and the 2027 city budget, focusing on police pay raises.
charlotte_impact: Provides insight into the city's priorities and challenges in infrastructure, public safety, and budget allocation.

title: Shooting in Northwest Charlotte Injures One
summary: One person was shot in northwest Charlotte. The victim was found in Huntersville and transported to the hospital.
charlotte_impact: Another incident of gun violence raises concerns about public safety in Charlotte neighborhoods.

title: Fire Cancels Weekend Games at Hickory Stadium
summary: A fire at Hickory's L. P. Frans Stadium caused heavy damage to the visiting team clubhouse, leading to the cancellation of weekend games.
charlotte_impact: Impacts local sports and community events due to infrastructure damage.

title: Traffic Backed Up on I-85 Due to Multiple Collisions
summary: Two separate crashes on I-85 in Charlotte caused significant traffic delays Saturday afternoon.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the challenges of traffic management and safety on major roadways.

title: Two Deadly Crashes in Catawba County
summary: Two fatal car accidents occurred in Catawba County within hours of each other. No charges are expected to be filed.
charlotte_impact: Reflects on road safety and the tragic consequences of traffic accidents.

title: Fatal Crash on I-85 South Under Investigation
summary: A deadly crash on I-85 South in Charlotte near Little Rock Road is under investigation by emergency crews.
charlotte_impact: Another incident highlighting the dangers of highway travel and the need for road safety measures.

title: Competency Hearing Scheduled in Zarutska Murder Case
summary: A competency hearing is scheduled for Decarlos Brown, charged with the murder of Iryna Zarutska. He faces multiple charges.
charlotte_impact: Follows a high-profile criminal case and the legal proceedings involved.

title: Woman Raped at Vape Shop in North Charlotte, Suspect Arrested
summary: A woman was raped at the Arbor Smoke Shop in north Charlotte. A suspect has been arrested in connection with the incident.
charlotte_impact: Addresses a serious crime and its impact on community safety and well-being.

title: Foxx Urges Rethink of I-77 Toll Expansion
summary: Former Mayor Foxx calls for a rethink of the I-77 toll lane expansion, citing its potential impact on Black neighborhoods.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about the equity and social impact of infrastructure projects.

title: CMS Board to Review Updated Budget Proposal
summary: The CMS board will review an updated budget proposal on Friday after rejecting the superintendent's $2.1 billion proposal on April 28.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing discussions and decisions related to education funding.

title: Water Leak Unfixed for a Year Amid Drought
summary: Charlotte Water let a leak near a school sit unfixed for almost a year. Charlotte loses 15% of its water annually.
charlotte_impact: Exposes issues with water management and infrastructure maintenance during a drought.
